reforms.description: Portugal is establishing a Development Financial Institution aimed at providing financing to small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs), which will be operational before the end of the year. Additionally, the government has initiated a new SME credit programme worth EUR 2 billion to increase lending resources available for SMEs, with a portion specifically earmarked for promoting export activities. Furthermore, the government supports venture capital through 'Portugal Ventures' and is exploring ways to strengthen its availability for young technology-based firms.
reforms.component_name: SME Development Financial Institution and Credit Programme
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The establishment of financial institutions and credit programmes enhances access to capital for SMEs, fostering innovation and growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The SME credit programme has been initiated and is operational.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reforms significantly enhance support for SMEs but do not represent a complete overhaul of the system.
reforms.source_quote: A new SME credit programme worth EUR 2 billion has been established in March 2013, with part of the funds earmarked for promoting export activities of SMEs.

reforms.description: Portugal should consider allowing refunds of R&D tax credits for loss-making firms or extending the carry-forward period for R&D expenditures to enhance the innovation landscape and support new entrants in the market. Public support for business R&D and innovation is primarily provided through tax credits, which may inadvertently favor established firms over new entrants, indicating a need for a better balance between direct support and tax credits.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Adjusting R&D tax credits to support loss-making firms encourages innovation and new market entrants.
reforms.status_evidence: The reform is under consideration and has been announced.
reforms.importance_rationale: The proposed changes to R&D tax credits represent a significant reform in the innovation support system.
reforms.source_quote: Improve the links between researchers in universities and the private sector. Consider allowing refunds of research and development (R&D) tax credits for loss-making firms, or extending the carry-forward period.

reforms.description: Portugal undertook a broad corporate income tax reform in 2014, which included a reduction in the tax rate, changes to the tax base affecting investment incentives, and simplification measures to reduce compliance costs.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The reform aims to enhance investment incentives and reduce compliance costs, which can stimulate business innovation.
reforms.status_evidence: The corporate income tax reform has been enacted and is in effect.
reforms.importance_rationale: The corporate income tax reform represents a significant overhaul of the tax system affecting innovation.
reforms.source_quote: The Portuguese authorities undertook a broad corporate income tax reform in 2014, comprising a rate reduction, changes to the tax base affecting investment incentives and simplification measures aimed at reducing compliance costs.

reforms.description: Portugal has initiated a Strategic Programme for Entrepreneurship and Innovation aimed at promoting knowledge transfers from academia to industry through various channels, addressing the weak linkages between research efforts and their commercialization.
reforms.component_name: Strategic Programme for Entrepreneurship and Innovation
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Promoting knowledge transfer enhances the commercialization of research, fostering innovation and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The programme has been initiated and is in the process of implementation.
reforms.importance_rationale: The initiative represents a significant effort to strengthen the link between research and industry.
reforms.source_quote: A Strategic Programme for Entrepreneurship and Innovation seeks to promote knowledge transfers from academia to industry through several channels.
